items.name_en: ЁЯФеЁЯФЭNew ArrivalЁЯСПЁЯСЙBlack Oil Wax Leather/GoldЁЯМИYSL New Bag King Bomb! Niki tripouch is truly amazing! Who gets it! This vintage oil wax leather is just on point! The distressed cracks act like a filter. The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. Medium size is just right for daily outings; fits compact powder, sunglasses, etc. Crossbody is a lazy sister, slung is a cool girl, with a suit is a career woman, with streetwear is a fashionista. Practicality and aesthetics both present.

items.name_cn:
ЁЯЧпЁЯТ░
тЦкя╕ПLE 5 ├А 7тЦк
The Y brand's much-anticipated underarm bag is finally here!!я╕П
I loved the name at first sight; it is inspired by the niche film 'Cl├йo from 5 to 7', telling the story of the 5-7 PM gap between work and home, and how the protagonist Cl├йo gradually reveals her independent side. Looking back at the bag itself, the silhouette is simple and structured, appearing firm yet not too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, the overall look gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Size: 24.5x16x6cm
Model No.: 657228 Patent Leather

items.name_cn:
2024 New LE 5A 7 HOBO
Y's 2024 Autumn New LE 5A 7 Handbag, continuing the classic hobo style, minimalist yet designed! The bag is made of black grained cowhide, with a slender leather strip running through the opening. The gold letter logo buckle becomes the focal point, paired with a black suede leather lining. The practical bucket shape adapts to both casual vacation and city scenes!

Size: 26x31.5x15cm

Surprisingly lightweight with high practicality! Don't let the small size fool you, the capacity is definitely enough ЁЯСН Can be carried by hand, worn over the shoulder, or crossbody! Definitely not a useless little bag ЁЯШО
